name: Shimla Manali Chandigarh Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Chandigarh, Shimla, Manali with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

variants.label: 6N/7D
variants.old_html_file: Shimla Manali Chandigarh Tour Packages 07 Days.html

itinerary.title: Delhi/Chandigarh – Shimla (350 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi/Chandigarh – Shimla (350 Kms. 8 Hrs. approx.)(Chandigarh to Shimla 120 Kms 4 Hrs. approx.): Arrival at Delhi/Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station company representative assist you and proceed to Shimla & Stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts
itinerary.description: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts). Kufri is also renowned for other adventure activities such as skiing, tobogganing (sliding downhill on a sled), etc. Kufri has the oldest skiing slopes in Himachal Pradesh. You can also take a hike or a Pony up to Mashu Peak(own cost direct payment basis). Afternoon: Guests will be dropped at the Shimla elevator & explore by themselves. Attractions of the mall road include Shimla Church, Scandal Point, Gaiety Thea

itinerary.title: Shimla – Manali (240 Kms
itinerary.description: Shimla – Manali (240 Kms. 8 Hrs. approx.):After breakfast at the hotel, depart for Manali. Drive past Beas-Sutlej Link project, Pandoh Dam & En-Rout halt Kullu Valley (Boat ride-Direct payment basis) . Lunch shall be en-route on direct payment basis. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast go for a full day excursion to Solang valley day tour, Solang Va
itinerary.description: After breakfast go for a full day excursion to Solang valley day tour, Solang Valley with its rolling meadows, ski slopes and paragliding activities ( Own cost-Direct payment basis),  Overnight stay at the hotel. * Optional Tour with extra paid: Atul tunel, Sissu, Rohtang pas

itinerary.title: After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali
itinerary.description: After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali. visit Vashishtha Kund & Hadimba Temple, Van Vihar, Tibetan Monastery & Mall Road. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali to Chandigarh (270 Kms
itinerary.description: Manali to Chandigarh (270 Kms. 7/8 Hrs. approx.); After breakfast Proceed to Chandigarh & visit Pinjore garden. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Chandigarh to Delhi (250 Kms
itinerary.description:
Chandigarh to Delhi (250 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx.); After breakfast, proceed to visit Rose garden, Rock garden and proceed to Delhi & drop you at airport/railway station .
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
(Honeymoon Tour available on demand)
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast & Dinner
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
